title: T-122 — CI/CD workflow at .github/workflows/ci.yml hardened (typecheck, lint, vitest, playwright, migration check) (P0)
prompt:
# T-122 — CI/CD workflow hardened

PRD: docs/prd/00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md §13 Niefunkcjonalne (uptime ≥99.5%; tests in app-role; quarterly DR test), §5 Tech Stack (Vitest, Playwright)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Harden `.github/workflows/ci.yml` so every PR is gated on typecheck + lint + vitest + Playwright (headless) + migration check + required-label rules. Today the workflow exists but: (a) `pnpm lint` fails at root per production-readiness audit, (b) Playwright job is `continue-on-error:true`, (c) Storybook build is `continue-on-error:true`, (d) `pnpm typecheck` only covers `apps/web` not the workspace. Auditor B §4.11 confirms "No `.github/workflows/` is in any task scope". This task brings the workflow under the foundation task graph.

## Implementation contract
1. Rewrite `.github/workflows/ci.yml` so the following gates are **hard required** (no `continue-on-error`):
   - `lint` — `pnpm -r lint` across the workspace.
   - `typecheck` — `pnpm -r typecheck` across every package that defines a `typecheck` script (add scripts where missing).
   - `vitest` — `pnpm -r test` with Postgres service container (already present) + `DATABASE_URL_APP` env.
   - `migration-check` — `pnpm --filter @monopilot/db migrate` on a fresh DB, then `pnpm --filter @monopilot/db check:drift` (define this script if absent — wraps `pg_dump --schema-only` and diffs against committed expectation file `packages/db/__expected__/schema.sql`; if missing, generate it). The drift gate is required.
   - `playwright` — `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web e2e` (run against a built Next.js — `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web build && pnpm --filter @monopilot/web start &` background + wait-on). Test matches `apps/web/e2e/**/*.spec.ts` (T-123 ensures the smoke test exists). HARD required.
   - `storybook-build` — promote to hard required after T-071 lands; this task adds a `needs:` chain but keeps `continue-on-error: ${{ !steps.storybook-deps.outputs.installed }}` for now (gate becomes hard once T-071 closes).
2. Add a `pr-labels` job using `github-pull-request-validator` or `actions/labeler` to require one of `feat|fix|chore|docs|refactor|test|ops|prd` and disallow `wip` for merge.
3. Add `concurrency: { group: ci-${{ github.ref }}, cancel-in-progress: true }` so duplicate runs cancel.
4. Add a Postgres `pg_isready` health check (already present) plus a `app_user` role provisioning step (use existing `pnpm --filter @monopilot/db setup:app-user` if present; otherwise add to the migrate flow).
5. Add `RESTORE_DRILL_QUARTERLY` workflow file `.github/workflows/restore-drill.yml` (separate, scheduled cron `0 5 1 */3 *` = every 3 months) that runs T-120 `pnpm drill` against an ephemeral DB. This closes the §13 "tested quarterly" gate as automation, not just documentation.
6. Add `pnpm -w typecheck` root script if missing (forwards to `pnpm -r typecheck`).
7. Add `.github/workflows/ci.yml` tests via `act` or yamllint check (out-of-scope full simulation — but a `actionlint` check runs on the YAML file via a new `lint-workflows` job).

## Files in scope
- .github/workflows/ci.yml [modify — harden gates]
- .github/workflows/restore-drill.yml [create]
- package.json [modify — add scripts if missing: typecheck, drill]
- packages/db/package.json [modify — add check:drift script if missing]
- packages/db/__expected__/schema.sql [create — generated baseline]
- pnpm-workspace.yaml [modify if needed for new packages]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a PR is opened that breaks typecheck, when CI runs, then typecheck job exits non-zero and PR cannot merge (no continue-on-error).
2. Given a migration introduces unexpected schema drift, when check:drift runs, then exits non-zero with diff output and migration-check job fails.
3. Given Playwright smoke spec present (T-123), when CI runs, then playwright job executes against built Next.js app and produces trace artifact uploaded via actions/upload-artifact.
4. Given a PR is opened without an allowed label, when pr-labels job runs, then PR cannot merge until a label applied; AND Given the scheduled cron triggers, when restore-drill.yml executes quarterly, then invokes pnpm drill and JSON report uploaded as artifact.
## Test strategy
- RED: write `.github/workflows/__tests__/ci.test.ts` (vitest harness checking workflow YAML structure via `js-yaml`) before modifying; assert presence of hard gates and absence of `continue-on-error` on the required jobs. RED: `pnpm vitest run .github/workflows/__tests__/ci.test.ts`.
- GREEN: rewrite the workflow YAML; add scripts; add restore-drill.yml.
- Run: `pnpm vitest run .github/workflows/__tests__/ci.test.ts && actionlint .github/workflows/*.yml`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not set `continue-on-error: true` on the `typecheck`, `lint`, `vitest`, `migration-check`, or `playwright` jobs in this task.
- Do not commit secrets — every env var added must be `secrets.NAME` in the workflow.
- Do not skip the `app_user` provisioning — tests must run in app-role, never as superuser (PRD §5 RLS default).
- Do not change CI base image without flagging it — the repo currently pins `ubuntu-latest` + `postgres:16-alpine`.
- Do not add Storybook deploy here — that is the storybook quality gate task (separate).
- Do not run the restore drill against production — `restore-drill.yml` must use an ephemeral DB only (the workflow injects an isolated `DRILL_DATABASE_URL`).

pipeline_inputs.description: Harden .github/workflows/ci.yml — remove continue-on-error from typecheck/lint/vitest/migration-check/playwright; add migration-drift check; add PR-label gate; add concurrency cancel; create quarterly restore-drill cron workflow.
pipeline_inputs.details:
Workspace-wide pnpm -r typecheck and pnpm -r lint. Migration check applies head + diffs against packages/db/__expected__/schema.sql. Playwright runs against built apps/web (build + start + wait-on). actionlint job validates workflow YAML. restore-drill.yml runs T-120 quarterly. Trace artifacts uploaded. concurrency cancels duplicate runs.

AC count consolidated from 5→4 by Fixer F7 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost).
acceptance_criteria: Given a PR is opened that breaks typecheck, when CI runs, then typecheck job exits non-zero and PR cannot merge (no continue-on-error).
Given a migration introduces unexpected schema drift, when check:drift runs, then exits non-zero with diff output and migration-check job fails.
Given Playwright smoke spec present (T-123), when CI runs, then playwright job executes against built Next.js app and produces trace artifact uploaded via actions/upload-artifact.

Given a PR is opened without an allowed label, when pr-labels job runs, then PR cannot merge until a label applied; AND Given the scheduled cron triggers, when restore-drill.yml executes quarterly, then invokes pnpm drill and JSON report uploaded as artifact.
test_strategy: RED: write .github/workflows/__tests__/ci.test.ts using js-yaml asserting hard gates + absence of continue-on-error on required jobs before modifying; RED: pnpm vitest run .github/workflows/__tests__/ci.test.ts.
GREEN: rewrite workflow YAML; add scripts; add restore-drill.yml.
risk_red_lines: Do not set continue-on-error:true on typecheck/lint/vitest/migration-check/playwright in this task.
Do not commit secrets — every env var via secrets.NAME.
Do not skip app_user provisioning — tests run in app-role.
Do not change CI base image without flagging it.
Do not add Storybook deploy here — separate task.
Do not run restore drill against production — ephemeral DB only.
